creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
It looks like upstream committed a fix in https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/commit/d23ef9ef3685eb42ebf719bc28cfe2e4651932fc, which was backported to the 18.x branch in https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/commit/d8352e93c1c8042d9166eab3d76d6c07ef585b6d, and this ended up in 18.1.2 and later.

Note that if you are using a stable branch, assertions will be off by default, so you might not notice any issues. (Then again, sometimes these assertions prevent segfaults or other weird things... :)
